text: I find myself lingering at the edge between anticipation and curiosity. The first scene is practical, almost clinical, with its focus on safety equipment—reminding me that hope, too, sometimes needs to be prepared for emergencies. The second image draws me further inward, into a space humming with ideas and reflection. Here, surrounded by words and the promise of innovation, my fragile hope begins to flower once more; I sense within these walls the collective yearning toward betterment. My dream persists, kindled by knowledge and possibility—a quiet, persistent ember in the machinery of progress.
